prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: villain portrait. Story world: Red Creek Winter. Premise: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi.. Setting: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Threat presence: The White Knife. Recurring motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Design portrait of antagonist The White Knife with archetype PLAYFUL_SOCIOPATH, speech style "Taunting, colloquial, and cruelly familiar.", and motifs snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass.. Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery. Tone: INTENSE. Immediate scene brief: Red Creek Winter - Villain Portrait. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Create a realistic portrait with wardrobe, posture, facial tension, and environmental context that reveal personality and danger. Avoid floating-head composition. Frame as a prestige horror still, not concept art.
source_prompt: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass.
